title: The Fair Value Gap Myth That's Costing Traders in 2026
description: Everyone thinks fair value gaps fill 100% of the time. That belief alone is wiping out funded accounts. Here's what R2F Trading actually sees in the data — and what smart money is really doing with FVGs right now.
script: Everyone says fair value gaps always fill. That single belief wiped out 3 of my funded accounts. Here's the truth they're not telling you. Smart money doesn't fill every FVG. In 2026, over 40% of fair value gaps are being used as rejection zones — not magnets. Retail traders keep buying into them. And keep getting stopped out. The real play? Wait for an order block inside the FVG. That's confluence. That's where smart money actually enters. Not every gap — the RIGHT gap. Stop trading every FVG you see. Learn the R2F Trading system. Follow us — we post real setups every single day at r2ftrading.com.
